---
title: "My MAGNAVOX HDTV will not work at native resolution."
date: 2008-04-04
forum: General Help

### Post by apache2 on 2008-04-04
Alright, trying to get my dual screens working here.  My 2nd screen is my 19" magnavox HDTV which runs at 1440x900 native, however, it will not display this resolution in ubuntu 8.04.  It works on any widescreen resolution below that, but when I set it to 1440x900, my screen still stays "on", but it doesn't display anything at all.

Anyone know whats up?

/etc/X11/xorg.conf : 
```

# nvidia-settings: X configuration file generated by nvidia-settings
# nvidia-settings:  version 1.0  (buildd@vernadsky)  Tue Mar  4 20:24:34 UTC 2008
```

### Post by skydiver|goose on 2008-04-04
have you tried changing the refresh rate for your second screen to something lower? do you get an "input not supported" error on your tv, or a "no input detected"

---

### Post by apache2 on 2008-04-04
No, I did not receive an error on my screen of this nature (and I've seen it before in different situations, so I knew to be looking for that)


the power indication LED says that it is on, but nothing is displayed.

---

### Post by skydiver|goose on 2008-04-04
You HAVE enabled your second screen, haven't you?

I believe it's System > Preferences > Screens & Resolution

although it may be in Administration instead of Preferences

---
